summary: Frontend visual testing of Appeal Statistics page completed successfully. All 3 reported visual bugs have been fixed: 1) Hero section now has blue background (bg-blue-800) instead of white on both desktop and mobile viewports, 2) CTA button is now red (bg-red-600) and visible on blue background, 3) Footer has blue background (bg-blue-700) on /appeal-statistics route only. Landing page footer regression test passed - still has white background.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Appeal Statistics page visual fixes verified. Hero uses bg-blue-800, CTA button uses bg-red-600, Footer uses bg-blue-700 on /appeal-statistics route. Landing page footer remains white (no regression). All 6 sections render correctly.
